welcome.tagline: DOI governance and orchestration for research institutions.
welcome.description: Multi-user access control, approval workflows, and a complete audit trail — built on DataCite.

login.title: Log in to your account
login.description: Enter your email and password below to log in
login.head: Log in

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your details below to create your account
register.head: Register

forgot-password.title: Forgot password
forgot-password.description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
forgot-password.head: Forgot password

reset-password.title: Reset password
reset-password.description: Please enter your new password below
reset-password.head: Reset password

confirm-password.title: Confirm your password
confirm-password.description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.
confirm-password.head: Confirm password

verify-email.title: Verify email
verify-email.description: Please verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you.
verify-email.head: Email verification
verify-email.verification-sent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.

two-factor.head: Two-factor authentication
two-factor.recovery-description: Please confirm access to your account by entering one of your emergency recovery codes.
two-factor.code-description: Enter the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.
